title: Validate, benchmark, and close out the latency tranche
summary: Runs the full validation and benchmark gates, records the before-versus-after results, and closes the initiative with evidence.
scope_items: Run the targeted and full validation gates needed for the optimized code paths and initiative closeout.
Rerun the agreed benchmark set, compare the results to the recorded baseline, and capture the evidence in the closeout surfaces.
done_when_items: The full repository gates required by the initiative pass on the optimized tree.
The initiative closeout records the benchmark deltas and confirms the accepted latency improvements.
